---
title: "R Notebook"
output: none

Author: Galen O'Shea-Stone
Date: 9/30/25
Title: HOX_GDF11_focus
---

```{r}
# posthoc_HOX_GDF11_analysis.R
# HOX (A–D) + GDF11 post-hoc analysis
# - Heatmaps saved to disk via explicit devices (PDF + PNG@600dpi + SVG)
# - Per-cluster heatmaps (HOXA–D)
# - Schematic grids (A–D x PG1–13) with HOXA on top + category splits
# - Sample–sample correlation heatmap (HOX+GDF11)
# - PCA on HOX+GDF11
# - A→P profiles by paralog group (per condition)
# - GDF11 vs Posterior HOX (PG9–13) scatter

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
  library(tools)
  library(grid)
  library(scales)   # for hue_pal(), squish
})

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Config & folders
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
in_dir <- "deseq2_outputs"

date_tag <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d")
run_tag  <- paste0("HOX_GDF11_run_", date_tag, "_", sprintf("%04d", sample(1:9999, 1)))
out_dir  <- file.path(in_dir, run_tag)
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
cat("Saving HOX/GDF11 outputs to:", normalizePath(out_dir), "\n")

target_symbols <- c("GDF11")
hox_regex_full <- "^(HOX)([ABCD])([0-9]+)$"
hox_regex      <- "^HOX[ABCD][0-9]+"
cluster_order  <- c("A","B","C","D","Other")
groups_1_13    <- 1:13

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load prior outputs
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
norm_counts_file <- file.path(in_dir, "normalized_counts.csv")
coldata_file     <- file.path(in_dir, "coldata_used.csv")
annot_file       <- file.path(in_dir, "gene_annotation_used.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(norm_counts_file), file.exists(coldata_file), file.exists(annot_file))

norm_counts <- data.frame(fread(norm_counts_file), check.names = FALSE)
coldata     <- data.frame(fread(coldata_file), row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
gene_annot  <- data.frame(fread(annot_file),  check.names = FALSE)

stopifnot("Geneid" %in% colnames(gene_annot))
rownames(gene_annot) <- gene_annot$Geneid

idcol_nc <- if ("Geneid" %in% colnames(norm_counts)) "Geneid" else
            if ("V1" %in% colnames(norm_counts)) "V1" else
            colnames(norm_counts)[1]
rownames(norm_counts) <- norm_counts[[idcol_nc]]
norm_counts[[idcol_nc]] <- NULL

common_samples <- intersect(colnames(norm_counts), rownames(coldata))
if (!length(common_samples)) stop("No overlapping sample IDs between normalized_counts and coldata_used.")
norm_counts <- norm_counts[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
coldata     <- coldata[common_samples, , drop = FALSE]

for (cn in c("SYMBOL","Ensembl_GeneID","NCBI_GeneID"))
  if (!(cn %in% colnames(gene_annot))) gene_annot[[cn]] <- NA_character_

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Detect HOX + GDF11 and mapping
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
detect_cluster <- function(sym) {
  res <- data.frame(cluster = "Other", num = NA_integer_, is_hox = FALSE)
  if (is.na(sym) || !nzchar(sym)) return(res)
  m <- regexec(hox_regex_full, toupper(sym)); pr <- regmatches(sym, m)[[1]]
  if (length(pr) == 4) return(data.frame(cluster = pr[3], num = as.integer(pr[4]), is_hox = TRUE))
  m2 <- regexec("^(HOX)([ABCD])([0-9]+)", toupper(sym)); pr2 <- regmatches(sym, m2)[[1]]
  if (length(pr2) >= 4) return(data.frame(cluster = pr2[3], num = as.integer(pr2[4]), is_hox = TRUE))
  res
}

anno_df <- data.frame(
  Geneid   = rownames(gene_annot),
  SYMBOL   = gene_annot$SYMBOL %||% NA_character_,
  Ensembl  = gene_annot$Ensembl_GeneID %||% NA_character_,
  Entrez   = gene_annot$NCBI_GeneID %||% NA_character_,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
det <- do.call(rbind, lapply(anno_df$SYMBOL, detect_cluster))
anno_df$HOX_cluster <- det$cluster
anno_df$HOX_num     <- det$num
anno_df$is_HOX      <- det$is_hox

is_gdf    <- !is.na(anno_df$SYMBOL) & toupper(anno_df$SYMBOL) %in% toupper(target_symbols)
is_hox_fb <- (!anno_df$is_HOX) & grepl(hox_regex, anno_df$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)
is_gdf_fb <- (!is_gdf)         & grepl("^GDF11$",  anno_df$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)

keep_ids  <- anno_df$Geneid[ anno_df$is_HOX | is_gdf | is_hox_fb | is_gdf_fb ]
nc_sub    <- norm_counts[intersect(keep_ids, rownames(norm_counts)), , drop = FALSE]
anno_sub  <- anno_df[match(rownames(nc_sub), anno_df$Geneid), , drop = FALSE]

disp_symbol <- anno_sub$SYMBOL
disp_symbol[is.na(disp_symbol) | !nzchar(disp_symbol)] <- rownames(anno_sub)
names(disp_symbol) <- rownames(anno_sub)

ord <- order(
  factor(anno_sub$HOX_cluster, levels = cluster_order),
  ifelse(is.na(anno_sub$HOX_num), 99L, anno_sub$HOX_num),
  toupper(disp_symbol)
)
nc_sub      <- nc_sub[ord, , drop = FALSE]
anno_sub    <- anno_sub[ord, , drop = FALSE]
disp_symbol <- disp_symbol[ord]

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Export mapping & long expression
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
map_df <- data.frame(
  Geneid         = rownames(anno_sub),
  SYMBOL_display = unname(disp_symbol),
  SYMBOL_raw     = anno_sub$SYMBOL,
  HOX_cluster    = anno_sub$HOX_cluster,
  HOX_num        = anno_sub$HOX_num,
  Ensembl_GeneID = gene_annot[rownames(anno_sub), "Ensembl_GeneID"],
  NCBI_GeneID    = gene_annot[rownames(anno_sub), "NCBI_GeneID"],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
fwrite(map_df, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_gene_map.csv"))

expr_long <- as.data.frame(nc_sub, check.names = FALSE)
expr_long$SYMBOL_display <- disp_symbol
expr_long$HOX_cluster    <- anno_sub$HOX_cluster
expr_long$HOX_num        <- anno_sub$HOX_num
expr_long$Geneid         <- rownames(expr_long)
expr_long <- data.table::melt(
  data.table::as.data.table(expr_long),
  id.vars = c("Geneid","SYMBOL_display","HOX_cluster","HOX_num"),
  variable.name = "sample", value.name = "norm_count"
)
expr_long$log2_norm <- log2(as.numeric(expr_long$norm_count) + 1)
expr_long$condition <- coldata[expr_long$sample, "condition"]
fwrite(expr_long, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_expression_long.csv"))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot helpers — robust z-scoring & device-based saver
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
prep_z <- function(mat) {
  orig_ids <- rownames(mat)
  M <- as.matrix(mat)
  storage.mode(M) <- "double"
  M[!is.finite(M)] <- NA_real_
  M <- log2(M + 1)
  keep <- apply(M, 1, function(x) {
    xf <- x[is.finite(x)]
    if (length(xf) <= 1) return(FALSE)
    var(xf) > 0
  })
  if (!any(keep, na.rm = TRUE))
    return(list(mat = NULL, kept_ids = character(0), dropped = orig_ids))
  M <- M[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  Z <- t(scale(t(M))); Z[!is.finite(Z)] <- 0; Z[Z > 3] <- 3; Z[Z < -3] <- -3
  rownames(Z) <- rownames(M)
  list(mat = Z, kept_ids = rownames(Z), dropped = setdiff(orig_ids, rownames(Z)))
}

ensure_heatmap_matrix <- function(mat) {
  if (is.null(mat) || !nrow(mat) || !ncol(mat)) return(NULL)
  M <- as.matrix(mat)
  storage.mode(M) <- "double"
  M[!is.finite(M)] <- NA_real_
  keep <- rowSums(is.finite(M)) > 0
  if (!any(keep)) return(NULL)
  M <- M[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(M))) {
    ri <- M[i, ]
    if (anyNA(ri)) {
      med <- suppressWarnings(median(ri, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.finite(med)) med <- 0
      ri[!is.finite(ri)] <- med
      M[i, ] <- ri
    }
  }
  M
}

# Save pheatmap by explicitly opening/closing devices (PDF, PNG@600dpi, SVG)
save_pheatmap_all <- function(mat, stem, width = 8, height = 6, svg = TRUE,
                              dpi_png = 600, ...) {
  M <- ensure_heatmap_matrix(mat)
  if (is.null(M) || !nrow(M) || !ncol(M)) {
    warning("Heatmap skipped for ", basename(stem), " (empty after cleaning).")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # --- PDF ---
  pdf_file <- paste0(stem, ".pdf")
  grDevices::pdf(pdf_file, width = width, height = height)
  tryCatch({
    pheatmap::pheatmap(M, ...)   # draw to current device
  }, error = function(e) {
    grDevices::dev.off()
    stop("Failed writing PDF for ", basename(stem), ": ", e$message)
  })
  grDevices::dev.off()
  sz_pdf <- suppressWarnings(file.info(pdf_file)$size)
  if (is.na(sz_pdf) || sz_pdf == 0) warning("PDF appears empty: ", pdf_file)

  # --- PNG (high DPI) ---
  png_file <- paste0(stem, ".png")
  grDevices::png(png_file, width = width * dpi_png, height = height * dpi_png, res = dpi_png)
  tryCatch({
    pheatmap::pheatmap(M, ...)
  }, error = function(e) {
    grDevices::dev.off()
    stop("Failed writing PNG for ", basename(stem), ": ", e$message)
  })
  grDevices::dev.off()
  sz_png <- suppressWarnings(file.info(png_file)$size)
  if (is.na(sz_png) || sz_png == 0) warning("PNG appears empty: ", png_file)

  # --- SVG (if svglite available) ---
  if (svg && requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
    svg_file <- paste0(stem, ".svg")
    svglite::svglite(svg_file, width = width, height = height)
    tryCatch({
      pheatmap::pheatmap(M, ...)
    }, error = function(e) {
      grDevices::dev.off()
      stop("Failed writing SVG for ", basename(stem), ": ", e$message)
    })
    grDevices::dev.off()
    sz_svg <- suppressWarnings(file.info(svg_file)$size)
    if (is.na(sz_svg) || sz_svg == 0) warning("SVG appears empty: ", svg_file)
  }

  message("Saved heatmap: ", basename(stem),
          " [", if (!is.na(sz_pdf) && sz_pdf > 0) "PDF " else "",
          if (!is.na(sz_png) && sz_png > 0) "PNG " else "",
          if (exists("sz_svg") && !is.na(sz_svg) && sz_svg > 0) "SVG" else "", "]")
  invisible(NULL)
}

save_plot_both <- function(plot, file_stem, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300) {
  ggsave(paste0(file_stem, ".pdf"), plot, width = width, height = height)
  ggsave(paste0(file_stem, ".png"), plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi)
  if (requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
    ggsave(paste0(file_stem, ".svg"), plot, width = width, height = height, device = svglite::svglite)
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Unified condition palette (consistent across pheatmap & ggplot)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
stopifnot("condition" %in% colnames(coldata))
cond_levels <- unique(coldata$condition)
coldata$condition <- factor(coldata$condition, levels = cond_levels)

ann_col <- data.frame(condition = coldata$condition)
rownames(ann_col) <- rownames(coldata)

cond_palette <- setNames(hue_pal()(length(cond_levels)), cond_levels)
ann_colors <- list(condition = cond_palette)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Combined heatmap with cluster gaps
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 0) {
  rows_df <- data.frame(
    gene_id = rownames(nc_sub),
    label   = unname(disp_symbol),
    cluster = anno_sub$HOX_cluster,
    num     = anno_sub$HOX_num,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  prep <- prep_z(nc_sub)
  mat_z <- prep$mat

  if (!is.null(mat_z)) {
    kept_ids <- prep$kept_ids
    lbls <- rows_df$label[match(kept_ids, rows_df$gene_id)]
    clks <- rows_df$cluster[match(kept_ids, rows_df$gene_id)]
    rownames(mat_z) <- lbls
    gap_idx <- which(head(clks, -1) != tail(clks, -1))

    save_pheatmap_all(
      mat_z,
      stem = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_heatmap_ALL_clusters"),
      width = 8.5, height = 7,
      annotation_col = ann_col,
      annotation_colors = ann_colors,
      cluster_rows   = FALSE,
      cluster_cols   = TRUE,
      gaps_row       = gap_idx,
      show_rownames  = TRUE,
      fontsize_row   = 7,
      main = "HOX (A–D) + GDF11 — log2(norm+1) z-scored; rows ordered by cluster & number"
    )
  } else {
    warning("All rows had zero variance for combined heatmap; skipped.")
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# HOX cluster grid (A–D × 1–13) — schematic-like tile plot (HOXA on TOP)
# and category-specific grids (anterior / thoracic / posterior_sacral)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
expr_means <- expr_long[, c("SYMBOL_display","HOX_cluster","HOX_num","sample","log2_norm")]
expr_means <- expr_means[!is.na(expr_means$HOX_cluster) & !is.na(expr_means$HOX_num), ]
gene_means <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ SYMBOL_display + HOX_cluster + HOX_num,
                        data = expr_means, FUN = mean)

grid_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(c("A","B","C","D"), function(cl) {
  data.frame(HOX_cluster = cl, HOX_num = groups_1_13)
}))
grid_df <- merge(grid_df, gene_means,
                 by = c("HOX_cluster","HOX_num"), all.x = TRUE, sort = TRUE)
grid_df$label <- paste0("HOX", grid_df$HOX_cluster, grid_df$HOX_num)

# Put HOXA at the TOP (ggplot draws first level at bottom)
y_levels <- c("D","C","B","A")          # bottom→top = D,C,B,A => shows A at the top
y_labels <- c("HOXD","HOXC","HOXB","HOXA")

# Unified color limits across all grids for comparability
vmin <- suppressWarnings(min(grid_df$log2_norm, na.rm = TRUE)); if (!is.finite(vmin)) vmin <- 0
vmax <- suppressWarnings(max(grid_df$log2_norm, na.rm = TRUE)); if (!is.finite(vmax)) vmax <- 1
# New: center the diverging scale on the cohort median (so colors reflect above/below avg)
vmid <- suppressWarnings(median(grid_df$log2_norm, na.rm = TRUE)); if (!is.finite(vmid)) vmid <- (vmin + vmax)/2

# Combined A–D × 1–13 grid
p_grid <- ggplot(
  grid_df,
  aes(x = HOX_num, y = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = y_levels), fill = log2_norm)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey30") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.na(log2_norm), "", paste0(substr(HOX_cluster,1,1), HOX_num))),
            size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = groups_1_13) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = y_labels) +
  # UPDATED palette: diverging with midpoint at vmid, shared limits, NA light gray
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = vmid, limits = c(vmin, vmax),
    oob = squish, na.value = "grey85",
    name = "mean log2(norm+1)"
  ) +
  labs(title = "HOX clusters schematic — mean expression per homology group",
       x = "Homology group (1→13; 3'→5')", y = "") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
save_plot_both(p_grid, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_schematic_grid"), width = 10, height = 4.5)

# Category-specific grids
category_bins <- list(
  anterior         = 1:3,
  thoracic         = 4:8,
  posterior_sacral = 9:13
)
for (cat_name in names(category_bins)) {
  rng <- category_bins[[cat_name]]
  sub_df <- grid_df[grid_df$HOX_num %in% rng, , drop = FALSE]
  p_sub <- ggplot(
    sub_df,
    aes(x = HOX_num, y = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = y_levels), fill = log2_norm)
  ) +
    geom_tile(color = "grey30") +
    geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.na(log2_norm), "", paste0(substr(HOX_cluster,1,1), HOX_num))),
              size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = rng) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = y_labels) +
    # UPDATED palette (same settings so categories match the full grid)
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = vmid, limits = c(vmin, vmax),
      oob = squish, na.value = "grey85",
      name = "mean log2(norm+1)"
    ) +
    labs(title = paste0("HOX schematic — ", gsub("_", " ", cat_name), " (PG", min(rng), "–", max(rng), ")"),
         x = "Homology group (3'→5')", y = "") +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
  w <- 3 + 0.55 * length(rng)
  save_plot_both(p_sub, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX_schematic_grid_", cat_name)), width = w, height = 4.0)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-gene boxplots (FILLED by condition + visible whiskers/box)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 0) {
  expr_long$SYMBOL_display <- factor(expr_long$SYMBOL_display, levels = disp_symbol)
  bp <- ggplot(expr_long, aes(x = condition, y = log2_norm, fill = condition)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = condition), width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
    facet_wrap(~ SYMBOL_display, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
    labs(title = "HOX + GDF11 expression by condition",
         y = "log2(normalized counts + 1)", x = "") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cond_palette) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette, guide = "none")
  save_plot_both(bp, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_boxplots_log2norm_by_condition"),
                 width = 20, height = max(4, ceiling(nrow(nc_sub)/4)*2.8))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DE contrast summaries + LFC lollipops
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
all_de <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "^DESeq2_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
sym_to_geneid <- setNames(rownames(gene_annot), gene_annot$SYMBOL)
ens_to_geneid <- setNames(rownames(gene_annot), gene_annot$Ensembl_GeneID)

summary_list <- list()
for (f in all_de) {
  rn_dt <- fread(f); rn <- as.data.frame(rn_dt, check.names = FALSE)
  idcol <- if ("row.names" %in% colnames(rn)) "row.names" else
           if ("V1" %in% colnames(rn)) "V1" else colnames(rn)[1]
  rownames(rn) <- rn[[idcol]]; rn[[idcol]] <- NULL
  rn$Geneid <- rownames(rn)

  not_geneid <- !(rn$Geneid %in% rownames(gene_annot))
  if (any(not_geneid)) {
    hit_sym <- rn$Geneid[not_geneid] %in% names(sym_to_geneid)
    rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_sym] <- sym_to_geneid[rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_sym]]
  }
  not_geneid <- !(rn$Geneid %in% rownames(gene_annot))
  if (any(not_geneid)) {
    hit_ens <- rn$Geneid[not_geneid] %in% names(ens_to_geneid)
    rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_ens] <- ens_to_geneid[rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_ens]]
  }

  rn$SYMBOL_display <- gene_annot[rn$Geneid, "SYMBOL"]
  rn$SYMBOL_display[is.na(rn$SYMBOL_display) | !nzchar(rn$SYMBOL_display)] <- rn$Geneid

  keep_rows <- grepl(hox_regex, rn$SYMBOL_display) |
               toupper(rn$SYMBOL_display) %in% toupper(target_symbols) |
               grepl(hox_regex, rn$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE) |
               grepl("^GDF11$", rn$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)

  rn_sub <- rn[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(rn_sub) > 0) {
    contrast_label <- sub("^DESeq2_", "", sub("\\.csv$", "", basename(f)))
    rn_sub$contrast <- contrast_label
    fwrite(rn_sub, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX_GDF11_", contrast_label, ".csv")))

    lfc_col <- if ("log2FC_shrunken" %in% colnames(rn_sub)) "log2FC_shrunken" else
               if ("log2FC" %in% colnames(rn_sub)) "log2FC" else NA
    if (!is.na(lfc_col)) {
      lp <- ggplot(rn_sub, aes(x = .data[[lfc_col]], y = SYMBOL_display)) +
        geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = .data[[lfc_col]],
                         y = SYMBOL_display, yend = SYMBOL_display)) +
        geom_point(size = 2) +
        labs(title = paste0("HOX + GDF11 LFC — ", contrast_label),
             x = if (lfc_col == "log2FC_shrunken") "log2FC (shrunken)" else "log2FC (Wald)",
             y = "") +
        theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
        theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
      save_plot_both(lp, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX_GDF11_LFC_", contrast_label)),
                     width = 7, height = max(3.5, nrow(rn_sub) * 0.3 + 1.5))
    }
    summary_list[[length(summary_list) + 1]] <- rn_sub
  }
}

if (length(summary_list)) {
  all_summary <- data.table::rbindlist(summary_list, fill = TRUE)
  fwrite(all_summary, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_all_contrasts_tidy.csv"))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Sample–sample correlation heatmap (HOX+GDF11)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 1) {
  mat_log2 <- log2(nc_sub + 1)
  keep <- apply(mat_log2, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
  mat_log2 <- as.matrix(mat_log2[keep, , drop = FALSE])
  if (nrow(mat_log2) > 1) {
    cor_mat <- cor(mat_log2, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
    save_pheatmap_all(
      cor_mat,
      stem = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_sample_correlation"),
      width = 7.5, height = 6.5,
      annotation_col = ann_col, annotation_row = ann_col,
      annotation_colors = ann_colors,
      cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
      main = "Sample–sample correlation (HOX+GDF11)"
    )
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA on HOX+GDF11 (scores plot)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 1) {
  X <- log2(nc_sub + 1)
  X <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(X)), center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)); X[!is.finite(X)] <- 0
  pca <- tryCatch(prcomp(t(X), center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(pca) && ncol(pca$x) >= 2) {
    pca_df <- data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
    pca_df$sample    <- rownames(pca_df)
    pca_df$condition <- coldata[rownames(pca_df), "condition"]
    var_exp <- pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)
    pc1lab <- sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", 100 * var_exp[1])
    pc2lab <- sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", 100 * var_exp[2])

    pp <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition, label = sample)) +
      geom_point(size = 2.6) +
      labs(title = "PCA on HOX+GDF11", x = pc1lab, y = pc2lab) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
      scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette)
    if (requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
      pp <- pp + ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 50, box.padding = 0.3, segment.size = 0.2)
    }
    save_plot_both(pp, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_PCA"), width = 7.5, height = 6.2)
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# A→P profiles by condition (per cluster)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ap_df <- expr_long[!is.na(expr_long$HOX_num) & expr_long$HOX_cluster %in% c("A","B","C","D"), ]
if (nrow(ap_df)) {
  ap_cond <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ condition + HOX_cluster + HOX_num, data = ap_df, FUN = mean)
  ap_cond$HOX_cluster <- factor(ap_cond$HOX_cluster, levels = c("A","B","C","D"))
  ap_plot <- ggplot(ap_cond, aes(x = HOX_num, y = log2_norm, color = condition, group = condition)) +
    geom_line(size = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ HOX_cluster, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y",
               labeller = as_labeller(c(A="HOXA",B="HOXB",C="HOXC",D="HOXD"))) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = groups_1_13) +
    labs(title = "Anterior→posterior HOX profiles by condition",
         x = "Paralog group (PG1→PG13)", y = "mean log2(norm+1)") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette)
  save_plot_both(ap_plot, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_AP_profiles_by_condition"), width = 12, height = 3.8)

  for (cl in c("A","B","C","D")) {
    sub <- ap_cond[ap_cond$HOX_cluster == cl, , drop = FALSE]
    if (!nrow(sub)) next
    pp <- ggplot(sub, aes(HOX_num, log2_norm, color = condition, group = condition)) +
      geom_line(size = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.7) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = groups_1_13) +
      labs(title = paste0("HOX", cl, " anterior→posterior profile by condition"),
           x = "Paralog group (PG1→PG13)", y = "mean log2(norm+1)") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
      scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette)
    save_plot_both(pp, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX", cl, "_AP_profile_by_condition")),
                   width = 7.5, height = 4.2)
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# GDF11 vs posterior HOX (PG9–13) per-sample association
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
has_gdf11 <- any(toupper(expr_long$SYMBOL_display) == "GDF11")
if (has_gdf11) {
  gdf_df <- expr_long[toupper(expr_long$SYMBOL_display) == "GDF11", c("sample","log2_norm","condition")]
  names(gdf_df)[2] <- "gdf11"
  post_df <- expr_long[expr_long$HOX_cluster %in% c("A","B","C","D") & expr_long$HOX_num %in% 9:13, ]
  if (nrow(post_df)) {
    post_mean <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ sample, data = post_df, FUN = mean)
    names(post_mean)[2] <- "posterior_hox"
    m <- merge(gdf_df, post_mean, by = "sample", all = FALSE)
    if (nrow(m) >= 3) {
      r <- suppressWarnings(cor(m$gdf11, m$posterior_hox, use = "complete.obs"))
      subttl <- if (is.finite(r)) sprintf("Pearson r = %.2f", r) else NULL

      sp <- ggplot(m, aes(x = gdf11, y = posterior_hox, color = condition, label = sample)) +
        geom_point(size = 2.4) +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
        labs(title = "GDF11 vs posterior HOX (PG9–13) per sample",
             subtitle = subttl,
             x = "GDF11 log2(norm+1)", y = "Posterior HOX (PG9–13) mean log2(norm+1)") +
        theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
        theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
        scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette)
      save_plot_both(sp, file.path(out_dir, "GDF11_vs_posteriorHOX_scatter"), width = 7.2, height = 5.8)
    }
  }
}

# ==============================================================================
# ADD-ON: Sacral-focused analyses & “in situ”-style summaries
# ==============================================================================
PG_ANT <- 1:3
PG_POST <- 10:13

# Compute per-sample posterior score (mean log2norm across HOX PG10–13) and A→P index
score_df <- NULL
if (exists("expr_long") && nrow(expr_long)) {
  el_hox <- expr_long[expr_long$HOX_cluster %in% c("A","B","C","D") & !is.na(expr_long$HOX_num), ]

  post_df <- el_hox[el_hox$HOX_num %in% PG_POST, ]
  post_score <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ sample, data = post_df, FUN = mean)
  names(post_score)[2] <- "posterior_score"

  ant_df <- el_hox[el_hox$HOX_num %in% PG_ANT, ]
  if (nrow(ant_df)) {
    ant_score <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ sample, data = ant_df, FUN = mean)
    names(ant_score)[2] <- "anterior_score"
  } else {
    ant_score <- data.frame(sample = unique(el_hox$sample), anterior_score = NA_real_)
  }

  score_df <- merge(post_score, ant_score, by = "sample", all = TRUE)
  score_df$AP_index <- score_df$posterior_score - score_df$anterior_score
  score_df$condition <- coldata[score_df$sample, "condition"]
  data.table::fwrite(score_df, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_AP_scores_per_sample.csv"))
}

# ---- Plot: posterior score & A→P index by condition (FILLED with whiskers)
if (!is.null(score_df)) {
  p1 <- ggplot(score_df, aes(x = condition, y = posterior_score, fill = condition)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65, color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = condition), width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 1.9) +
    labs(title = "Posterior HOX score (PG10–13) by condition",
         y = "mean log2(norm+1) across HOX PG10–13", x = "") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cond_palette) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette, guide = "none")
  save_plot_both(p1, file.path(out_dir, "posterior_HOX_score_by_condition"), width = 6.8, height = 4.6)

  if (any(!is.na(score_df$AP_index))) {
    p2 <- ggplot(score_df, aes(x = condition, y = AP_index, fill = condition)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65, color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
      geom_jitter(aes(color = condition), width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 1.9) +
      labs(title = "A→P index (posterior − anterior HOX)", y = "AP index", x = "") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = cond_palette) +
      scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette, guide = "none")
    save_plot_both(p2, file.path(out_dir, "AP_index_by_condition"), width = 6.8, height = 4.6)
  }
}

# ---- Heatmap: order samples by posterior score (sacral proxy)
if (!is.null(score_df) && exists("nc_sub") && nrow(nc_sub) > 0) {
  ord_samples <- score_df$sample[order(score_df$posterior_score, decreasing = TRUE)]
  mat <- nc_sub[, ord_samples, drop = FALSE]
  prep <- prep_z(mat)
  if (!is.null(prep$mat)) {
    mat_z <- prep$mat
    ann_col2 <- data.frame(
      condition = coldata[colnames(mat_z), "condition"],
      posterior_rank = rank(-score_df$posterior_score[match(colnames(mat_z), score_df$sample)])
    )
    rownames(ann_col2) <- colnames(mat_z)
    save_pheatmap_all(
      mat_z,
      stem = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_heatmap_samples_sorted_by_posteriorScore"),
      width = 9, height = 7,
      annotation_col = ann_col2,
      annotation_colors = list(condition = cond_palette),
      cluster_rows   = FALSE, cluster_cols = FALSE,
      show_rownames  = TRUE, fontsize_row = 7,
      main = "HOX+GDF11 — samples sorted by posterior HOX score (PG10–13)"
    )
  }
}

# ---- Paralog-group profile with sacral bins highlighted (overall mean)
if (exists("grid_df")) {
  sacral_rng <- PG_POST
  pg_means <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ HOX_num, data = grid_df, FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  pg_means$is_sacral <- pg_means$HOX_num %in% sacral_rng

  p_pg <- ggplot(pg_means, aes(HOX_num, log2_norm)) +
    geom_col(aes(alpha = is_sacral), width = 0.8) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = 1, `FALSE` = 0.5), guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
    labs(title = "Paralog-group mean expression (A–D combined)",
         subtitle = "Sacral groups (PG10–13) highlighted",
         x = "Paralog group (PG1→PG13)", y = "mean log2(norm+1) across HOX clusters") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
  save_plot_both(p_pg, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_paralog_group_profile_with_sacral_highlight"), width = 8.5, height = 4.2)
}

# ---- Gene–gene correlation (HOX A–D, PG9–13 + GDF11)
if (exists("nc_sub") && nrow(nc_sub) > 0) {
  want_rows <- (anno_sub$HOX_cluster %in% c("A","B","C","D") & anno_sub$HOX_num %in% 9:13) |
               (toupper(disp_symbol) %in% "GDF11")
  sub_mat <- nc_sub[want_rows, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(sub_mat) >= 3) {
    rowlabs <- disp_symbol[rownames(sub_mat)]
    rowlabs[is.na(rowlabs) | !nzchar(rowlabs)] <- rownames(sub_mat)
    X <- log2(sub_mat + 1)
    keep <- apply(X, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
    X <- as.matrix(X[keep, , drop = FALSE])
    if (nrow(X) >= 3) {
      C <- stats::cor(t(X), use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
      rownames(C) <- colnames(C) <- rowlabs[rownames(C)]
      save_pheatmap_all(
        C,
        stem = file.path(out_dir, "Corr_genes_PG9_13_plus_GDF11"),
        width = 7.5, height = 6.8,
        cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
        main = "Gene–gene correlation — HOX (PG9–13) + GDF11"
      )
    }
  }
}

# ---- Optional: stratify by somite region/category if present in metadata
possible_cols <- c("somite_region", "somite_category", "somite_class", "anatomy", "region")
have_col <- possible_cols[possible_cols %in% colnames(coldata)]
if (!is.null(score_df) && length(have_col) >= 1) {
  somite_group_col <- have_col[1]
  meta_cat <- as.character(coldata[score_df$sample, somite_group_col])
  recat <- function(x) {
    xlow <- tolower(x)
    if (requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)) {
      dplyr::case_when(
        grepl("sacral|sacrum|posterior", xlow) ~ "sacral",
        grepl("lumbar", xlow) ~ "lumbar",
        grepl("thoracic|thorax", xlow) ~ "thoracic",
        grepl("cervical|anterior", xlow) ~ "cervical",
        TRUE ~ "other"
      )
    } else {
      ifelse(grepl("sacral|sacrum|posterior", xlow), "sacral",
      ifelse(grepl("lumbar", xlow), "lumbar",
      ifelse(grepl("thoracic|thorax", xlow), "thoracic",
      ifelse(grepl("cervical|anterior", xlow), "cervical", "other"))))
    }
  }
  score_df$somite_group <- factor(recat(meta_cat), levels = c("cervical","thoracic","lumbar","sacral","other"))

  p3 <- ggplot(score_df, aes(x = somite_group, y = posterior_score, color = somite_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 1.9) +
    labs(title = paste0("Posterior HOX score by ", somite_group_col),
         x = somite_group_col, y = "posterior HOX score (PG10–13)") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
  save_plot_both(p3, file.path(out_dir, paste0("posterior_score_by_", somite_group_col)), width = 7.5, height = 4.8)

  if (any(!is.na(score_df$AP_index))) {
    p4 <- ggplot(score_df, aes(x = somite_group, y = AP_index, color = somite_group)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 1.9) +
      labs(title = paste0("A→P index by ", somite_group_col),
           x = somite_group_col, y = "AP index (posterior − anterior)") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
    save_plot_both(p4, file.path(out_dir, paste0("AP_index_by_", somite_group_col)), width = 7.5, height = 4.8)
  }
} else {
  message("No somite region/category column detected in coldata; skipping somite-stratified plots.")
}

# ---- GDF11 presence summary (answers: "Do we see GDF11 expression?")
gdf_tab <- NULL
has_gdf <- any(toupper(expr_long$SYMBOL_display) == "GDF11")
if (has_gdf) {
  gdf_vals <- expr_long[toupper(expr_long$SYMBOL_display) == "GDF11",
                        c("sample","log2_norm","condition")]
  names(gdf_vals)[2] <- "GDF11_log2norm"
  thr <- 1
  prev <- aggregate(GDF11_log2norm ~ condition, data = gdf_vals,
                    FUN = function(x) mean(x > thr))
  names(prev)[2] <- paste0("fraction_above_", thr)
  gdf_summary <- data.frame(
    overall_mean = mean(gdf_vals$GDF11_log2norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    overall_sd   = sd(gdf_vals$GDF11_log2norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples    = length(unique(gdf_vals$sample))
  )
  data.table::fwrite(gdf_vals, file.path(out_dir, "GDF11_log2norm_per_sample.csv"))
  data.table::fwrite(prev,     file.path(out_dir, "GDF11_prevalence_by_condition.csv"))
  data.table::fwrite(gdf_summary, file.path(out_dir, "GDF11_summary_overall.csv"))

  p_gdf <- ggplot(gdf_vals, aes(x = condition, y = GDF11_log2norm, fill = condition)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65, color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = condition), width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 1.9) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = thr, linetype = 2) +
    labs(title = "GDF11 expression by condition",
         subtitle = paste0("dashed line: log2(norm+1) = ", thr),
         y = "GDF11 log2(norm+1)", x = "") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cond_palette) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cond_palette, guide = "none")
  save_plot_both(p_gdf, file.path(out_dir, "GDF11_by_condition"), width = 6.8, height = 4.6)
} else {
  message("GDF11 not found in SYMBOL_display; checked Geneid earlier for fallbacks.")
}

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ==============================================================================
# Presence/Absence diagnostics for HOX grid (A–D × PG1–13)
# ==============================================================================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(ggplot2); library(data.table) })

slots <- do.call(rbind, lapply(c("A","B","C","D"), function(cl) {
  data.frame(HOX_cluster = cl, HOX_num = 1:13, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
slots$slot_symbol <- paste0("HOX", slots$HOX_cluster, slots$HOX_num)
ga <- gene_annot
nc <- norm_counts

find_ann_hits <- function(sym) {
  if (is.null(ga) || !nrow(ga)) return(character(0))
  sym_up <- toupper(sym)
  by_sym <- which(toupper(ga$SYMBOL) == sym_up)
  by_gid <- grep(paste0("^", sym, "$"), ga$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)
  unique(ga$Geneid[c(by_sym, by_gid)])
}

nc_ids <- rownames(nc)
grid_key <- NULL
if (exists("grid_df")) {
  grid_df_key <- grid_df[, c("HOX_cluster","HOX_num","log2_norm")]
  grid_key <- within(grid_df_key, { plotted <- !is.na(log2_norm) })
}

res <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(slots)), function(i) {
  cl  <- slots$HOX_cluster[i]
  pg  <- slots$HOX_num[i]
  sym <- slots$slot_symbol[i]

  ann_hits <- find_ann_hits(sym)
  in_ann   <- length(ann_hits) > 0

  if (!in_ann) {
    status <- "missing_in_annotation"
    mean_norm <- NA_real_
  } else {
    hit_in_counts <- intersect(ann_hits, nc_ids)
    if (!length(hit_in_counts)) {
      status <- "missing_in_counts"
      mean_norm <- NA_real_
    } else {
      vals <- as.matrix(nc[hit_in_counts, , drop = FALSE])
      vals[!is.finite(vals)] <- NA_real_
      mean_norm <- suppressWarnings(mean(vals, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.finite(mean_norm) || is.na(mean_norm) || mean_norm == 0) {
        status <- "in_counts_zero_expr"
      } else {
        status <- "present_expr_not_plotted"
      }
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(grid_key)) {
    ghit <- grid_key$plotted[grid_key$HOX_cluster == cl & grid_key$HOX_num == pg]
    if (length(ghit) == 1 && isTRUE(ghit)) status <- "plotted_in_schematic"
  }

  data.frame(HOX_cluster = cl,
             HOX_num     = pg,
             slot_symbol = sym,
             in_annotation = in_ann,
             ann_hits      = paste(ann_hits, collapse = ";"),
             status        = status,
             mean_norm     = mean_norm,
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})
pres_df <- do.call(rbind, res)

fwrite(pres_df, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_presence_grid.csv"))
summ <- as.data.frame(table(pres_df$status))
colnames(summ) <- c("status","n_slots")
fwrite(summ, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_presence_grid_summary.csv"))

pres_df$status <- factor(
  pres_df$status,
  levels = c("plotted_in_schematic",
             "present_expr_not_plotted",
             "in_counts_zero_expr",
             "missing_in_counts",
             "missing_in_annotation")
)
pal <- c(
  plotted_in_schematic     = "#1b9e77",
  present_expr_not_plotted = "#66a61e",
  in_counts_zero_expr      = "#7570b3",
  missing_in_counts        = "#d95f02",
  missing_in_annotation    = "#e7298a"
)

y_levels <- c("D","C","B","A")
y_labels <- c("HOXD","HOXC","HOXB","HOXA")

p_diag <- ggplot(
  pres_df,
  aes(x = HOX_num, y = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = y_levels))
) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = status), color = "grey30") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(substr(HOX_cluster,1,1), HOX_num)), size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = y_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE,
                    name = "Slot status",
                    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA))) +
  labs(title = "HOX presence/absence diagnostics (A–D × PG1–13)",
       subtitle = "Reasons for empty tiles in schematic",
       x = "Paralog group (PG1→PG13, 3′→5′)", y = "") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(vjust = 0.5),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

save_plot_both(p_diag, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_presence_grid"), width = 10, height = 4.5)

status_mat <- reshape(
  pres_df[, c("HOX_cluster","HOX_num","status")],
  timevar = "HOX_num", idvar = "HOX_cluster", direction = "wide"
)
row_order <- c("A","B","C","D")
status_mat <- status_mat[match(row_order, status_mat$HOX_cluster), ]
names(status_mat) <- sub("^status\\.", "PG", names(status_mat))
fwrite(status_mat, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_presence_grid_wide.csv"))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== HOX/GDF11 posthoc outputs ===\n")
cat("Input dir: ", normalizePath(in_dir), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Output dir:", normalizePath(out_dir), "\n")


```
